steps.t: Amarêkh, one of the Temámir guards stationed in Mekab-kuphâr, has asked you to leave offerings of food for the little spirits throughout Khabârkhad. T…
The second location is north of Mekab-kuphâr, near Nishabêt, home of monstrous spiders.
The third location is north-west of Mekab-kuphâr, near Lôkhalel, where tomb robbers keep their council.
Return to the Temámir Guard Amarêkh in Mekab-kuphâr in southern Khabârkhad.
